101

One who was possessed by Diana "became crazy." Horselover Fat was "crazy." Fairies were "originally considered dangerous & powerful." "Could (besides becoming invisible) change shape & size." Eliade: "One refers to them as 'the Holy Ones.'" "The munificent ones," which means 'very liberal in gift giving or generosity.' Did I not say, supra, "Diana is my gift given to me"?

The primary characteristic of VALIS is his ability to be invisible, when you boil it all down, he's part of the environment - a camouflaged life form.

"Scattered wits," means they have powers to control your mind, perceptions, etc. Again, technology; they can make you see (or not see) what they want.

lying in my --the-- tomb "dead" (i.e, close enough to it for the Good Friday magic to work). The vernal equinox, the corn king,

Horselover Fat, grieving over the dead girl Gloria, has slipped down into the tomb world (i.e. the tomb). Christ does not just restore you into the Mitwelt — which is where you were before you slipped down into the Umwelt/tomb world; no; he raises you to the Eigenwelt where you have never been before but only heard of ("born from above; born again"), where all things are new (the work of time abolished; the past is real: the kosmos of the phylogons).

(1) (Um); you are reified yourself. It - it.

(2) (Mit) A person among things. I - it.

Christ will never return in This realm; Fat is looking for the fifti savior in terms of where - i.e. space; but the fact is, it is in the other realm that Christ exists - exists now; I inferred all this from rereading "Valis"; it was not my view when I wrote it. Now, as regards this other realm we're talking specifically + precisely about Xtian apocalypsis. + this in turn specifically involves either the Parousia or at least the expectation of the Parousia. Now, when I wrote "Valis" I hadn't read The E.B. article on Messianic movements, which is What is involved in the other realm. How far along is the process? Did I not see Valis? + did I not identify Valis as Christ? Then we are talking about realized eschatology, but it is a covert realization - why? Does this fit in with the secrecy theme of mark? I can only conclude that there is no mass salvation. It does not work that way. Why, this means Christ did in fact return (at the time of Acts. So the other realm is at that time + place. At the end it is not tim come back; it is the Holy Spirit revealing to Bill his own Christ nature. Bill is me. This is the parousia: Christ in individuals. This novel is not about the return of Bishop Archer, but the return of Christ, i.e., the parousia, and it is him. Sophia, Emmanuel & Bill the Savior. "Not 3 stories, but 1 story 3 times"!! Like Horselover Fat, he is clinically crazy: So he (Bill) is Fat & Sophia combined: the seeker is the Savior (whom he seeks) Bill, by the Holy Spirit is justified into Christ.

Which explains 2-3-74

The Christ-to-be becomes the Christ who is (by the presence - entering of him by the Holy Spirit). This is what the "2nd Birth" i.e., "Birth in the Spirit" and "Birth from above" accomplishes. the Christ-to-be becomes the-Christ-who-is. Christoi are going to start coming into existence here & there. The adopted sons of God are through the Holy Spirit, Christoi.

Y-9 the whole is not just cosmos but is the cosmic Christ. Christus ubique! In my writing ("Tears") in me (Valis), in world (Valis), as an animal (pinky), etc. Christ dispersed throughout creation + yet one intact unitary entity (the vine, the "circulatory system. the mycelia); not many Christs but one as if (like Brahman) mirrored back over + over again. (later.) The full mystery is at last penetrated in a gentle, simple, almost pastoral way. What is involved is twofold: both faith + knowledge, which is to say understanding. By studying my many novels back to "confessions" I am by that means able to apperceive 2-74 - 2-75 as the real presence of Christ, in me + in world; + it is just that, exactly that (although, really, the details are elaborate, intricate, complex, many). What if anything this has to do with cernunnos + Dionysos, it if anything, I have no idea; but of a certainly it is Christ who entered me (enthusiasmos), which guess points to the Holy Spirit (it was not apotheosis; no: it was enthusiasmos, as the ending "BTA" verifies, + is clear in "Valis" as well).
